calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Francisco G. Torres, Esq., for the Plaintiff TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
Anthony Terry sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by GENIE BOWIE.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1011 Howard Street, Room #422 San Francisco, CA 94103.

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Paul Perdue; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Anthony Terry.
Attorney Francisco Torres for the plaintiff.
Defendant Genie Bowie is present.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-20-2015 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
